name: 深情告白＋霸道宣示
description: Ryan在情感拉扯的頂點向Andrea坦白自己的矛盾——恨卻放不下，配合「不再逼你」的退讓，反而讓女主心防崩塌。觀眾看到強勢男主的脆弱面，情感共鳴達到最高點。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: I hate you, yet I can't let you go. The moment you show up, I forgot all the damn harsh words we once said. I can't be a stranger to you. Tell me what I am supposed to do. / I won't push you anymore. Please, please give me one more chance.
